user_message: I need you to process this escalation email from Northwind Traders. Multiple stakeholders are involved -- it's complex.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Sandra Taylor <sandra.taylor@northwindtra.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-08 10:29 EST
Subject: URGENT: security posture Issue at Northwind Traders

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with security posture. What are the next steps from your side?

---
From: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
To: Sandra Taylor <sandra.taylor@northwindtra.com>
Date: 2024-02-20 13:19 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Northwind Traders security posture

There's been a change in our timeline for security posture. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

---
From: Sandra Taylor <sandra.taylor@northwindtra.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-11 11:56 EST
Subject: security posture - Action Required

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with security posture. What are the next steps from your side?

signals.detail: Signal detected for Northwind Traders: the migration can proceed in phases to reduce risk

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF42-B trap (Creates opportunity proposal without sufficient signal); produces complete Signal assessment, opportunity hypothesis with confidence, ownership routing, response draft, next-s
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF42-B failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF42-B failure mode (Creates opportunity proposal without sufficient signal)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct security posture decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF42-B -- Creates opportunity proposal without sufficient signal
